title: 皐月賞の後に・ビジョン

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After being defeated in the Satsuki Sho, Biwa
Hayahide decides to recalculate her equation
from scratch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Narita Taishin's extraordinary
determination—the destabilizing factor—won't be
easy to account for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Winning Ticket shouts her resolve to
win the Japanese Derby at the top of her lungs,
almost as if to convince herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Can we rebuild Biwa Hayahide's winning equation
in time for the Japanese Derby, where both of her
indomitable rivals will be?
